name: gamedev-tactics-action-adventure-scaffold
description: CROSS-GENRE: tactics (ATB/turn-based combat) + action (real-time overworld) + adventure (dialog/branching). Composes ATBCombat/TurnBasedCombat/PartyComposition + CameraFollow/AttackFrames + DialogTree/HotspotMechanic/WorldMapTravel/EndingBranches. Pure composition from @engine/mechanics.
